_comment: Runtime plugin dependencies for the SDLC pipeline. Read by pipeline-orchestrator/SKILL.md (Step 0a) at the start of /sdlc:start. This is OUR custom preflight mechanism — separate from Claude Code's native plugin.json/dependencies array, which only handles intra-marketplace install-time resolution. External plugins (other marketplaces) and per-skill availability checks live here.

dependencies.name: superpowers
dependencies.fallback_note: Pipeline runs without these but with reduced rigor in BA, QA, and Security phases.

dependencies.name: mattpocock-skills
dependencies.fallback_note: Pipeline runs without it but BA phase won't use interactive grilling for task specification.
